query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.cpf, c.role, c.isActive, c.canLogin, c.managedProgramId
FROM consultors c
WHERE c.email IN ('emanoel.querette@embrapii.org.br', 'leandro.rodrigues@embrapii.org.br')
   OR c.name LIKE '%Emanoel%' OR c.name LIKE '%Leandro Rodrigues%'
ORDER BY c.id DESC;
command:
